name: Crontab Modification for Unix Persistence
description: Detects crontab modifications used to establish persistence on Unix systems
query:
// Detect crontab modification commands
// Trigger on crontab -e or direct cron file writes
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(crontab\s+-[ei]|echo.*>>.*crontab|/etc/cron\.|/var/spool/cron)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
